title: Teleport Friend
description: Server-side mod that adds an instant tpfriend command allowing any player to teleport immediately to another online player without requiring operator privileges.
body:
🌟 Teleport Friend

Instant, frictionless travel for your server.

Teleport Friend is a lightweight, server-side utility mod for Forge 1.20.1. It removes the hassle of teleport requests, waiting times, and operator permissions, allowing players to instantly jump to their friends with a single command.

Designed for private servers and small friend groups, this mod ensures you spend less time walking and more time playing together.

✨ Key Features

Server-Side Only: Your friends do not need to install this mod on their clients. Just install it on the server, and it works for everyone!

Zero Friction: No /tpa requests, no acceptance required, and no cooldowns.

Cross-Dimension Support: seamlessly teleport from the Overworld to the Nether, End, or any custom dimension.

No OP Required: Regular players can use the command right out of the box.

🛠️ How to Use

Simply type the following command in chat:

/tpfriend <playername>

Example:

To teleport to a player named Steve, just type:

/tpfriend Steve

Easy
